title: ericoides decorum
intro: Ericoides decorum, also known as the Coral Bells or Dusky Coral Bells, is a flowering plant species in the heath family, Ericaceae. The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ericoides decorum include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications such as creams and salves.
